subcodes.first_line: O servants! The Light hath appeared, the Sun hath dawned from the Orient of the Book, the resplendent Proof hath been revealed, and the Kingdom of Utterance is manifest at the center of possibility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان نور ظاهر شمس مشرق کتاب نازل برهان باهر ملکوت بیان در قطب امکان
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
